title: KitPlugin
description: Simple Kit Plugin for Minecraft Varo/Events
body:
This Plugin adds the /kit Command. Usages: /kit <create/give/save/load/del/list> [name] [player]

/kit list:

• Shows all the Kits created

/kit create [name]:

• creates a kit

/kit save [name] 

• saves the players inventory as the Kit
WARNING: after saving a Kit restart the server or the /kit give command will give you an empty kit

/kit load [name] [player]:

• loads the selected kit into a players inventory

/kit give [name] [player]:

• gives players the selected kit
WARNING: if all players should get the kit to /kit give [name] all

/kit del [name]: 

• deletes the selected kit

I hope you'll have fun with this plugin
